productDisplayName: UCB Men's Johny Collar With Two Tone Grey T-shirt

The green tipping on the cuffs and collar and the embroidered Big Ben logo on the left chest enhances your regal style. The ribbed sleeve hems contour your well-toned arms perfectly, while the slits at the shirt ends offer a comfortable Fit. Team this with jeans and lifestyle sportswear for that cool, casual lookModel statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
